metadata.description: A curated collection of DevOps-oriented Claude Code plugins for CI/CD automation, infrastructure management, and deployment workflows. Designed for personal and team use.

plugins.name: cicd-automation
plugins.description: Review and generate CI/CD pipelines (GitHub Actions, GitLab CI). Checks security, SHA pinning, supply chain, permissions, caching, and compliance. Use when editing .github/workflows/ or .gitlab-ci.yml.
